steps.title: Require a direct comparison
steps.content: The hypothesis says intermediate-headed fish will be more likely than narrow-headed fish to detect obstructions that create large vortices in low visibility. Support should directly compare those two head shapes under those conditions.

steps.title: Reject one-sided findings
steps.content: Choice B gives only narrow-headed sturgeon results. Choice C compares members of the same intermediate-headed species to one another. Choice D gives only intermediate-headed smooth-hound results. The answer is A.
